name: psychological-types
description: C.G. Jung's 'Psychological Types' — the foundational work of modern personality theory, introducing extraversion and introversion, the four functions, and the concept of psychological type.
useCase: Understand yourself and others through Jung's type theory — explore introversion/extraversion, cognitive functions, relationships, and personal growth.
knownRisks: Dense academic text — the skill distills key concepts but cannot replace reading Jung's original work
Jung's framework differs from MBTI in important ways — don't conflate them
Some concepts (anima, animus, shadow) are complex — simplified explanations may miss nuance
